Bid Award Panel

Meeting No.:
1
Contact:
Jonathan Canchela, Committee Secretary
Meeting Date:
Wednesday, January 4, 2017

Phone:
416-392-8016
Start Time:
2:00 PM
E-mail:
bdc@toronto.ca
Location:
Meeting Room B, City Hall

Members of Council and Staff:  Please keep this agenda and the accompanying material until the City Council meeting dealing with these matters has ended.  The City Clerk's Office will not provide additional copies.

 

Special Assistance for Members of the Public:  City staff can arrange for special assistance with some advance notice. If you need special assistance, please call 416-392-6627 TTY 416-338-0889 or e-mail bdc@toronto.ca.

 

Closed Meeting Requirements:  If the Bid Award Panel wants to meet in closed session (privately), a member of the Panel must make a motion to do so and give the reason why the Panel has to meet privately. (City of Toronto Act, 2006)

 

Notice to people writing to the Bid Award Panel:  The City of Toronto Act, 2006 and the City of Toronto Municipal Code authorize the City of Toronto to collect any personal information in your communication or presentation to City Council or its committees.

 

The City collects this information to enable it to make informed decisions on the relevant

issue(s). If you are submitting letters, faxes, e-mails, presentations or other communications to the City, you should be aware that your name and the fact that you communicated with the City will become part of the public record and will appear on the City's website. The City will also make your communication and any personal information in it - such as your postal address, telephone number or e-mail address - available to the public, unless you expressly request the City to remove it.

 

If you want to learn more about why and how the City collects your information, write to the City Clerk's Office, City Hall, 100 Queen Street West, Toronto ON M5H 2N2 or by calling 416-392-6627.

 

 toronto.ca/council

This agenda and any supplementary materials submitted to the City Clerk can be found online at www.toronto.ca/council. Visit the website for access to all agendas, reports, decisions and minutes of City Council and its committees.  

 

 

 

 

Declarations of Interest under the Municipal Conflict of Interest Act

 

Confirmation of Minutes - December 21, 2016

 

BA1.1 - Election of Vice Chair - Bid Award Panel

Consideration Type:
ACTION

Summary

Election of the Vice Chair of the Bid Award Panel under Municipal Code Chapter 27, Council Procedures, Appendix AII, for a term of office ending December 31, 2017, and until a successor is appointed.

BA1.2 - Award of Call Number 6032-16-3114 to MeteoGroup Weather Services Canada Inc. for Preventative Maintenance to Maintain/Repair/Replace Five (5) Existing Road Weather Information Systems (RWIS)

Consideration Type:
ACTION
Wards:
All

Origin

(December 28, 2016) Report from the Director, Purchasing and Materials Management

Recommendations

The Director, Purchasing and Materials Management recommends that the Bid Award Panel grant authority to award the following contract:

 

Call Number:

RFQ No. 6032-16-3114

 

Description:

For the non-exclusive supply of all labour, parts, materials, insurance, travel time, mileage, services, supplies, tools, apparatus, transportation, equipment and incidentals required to provide all operations necessary for the preventative maintenance to maintain/repair/replacement for five (5) existing Road Weather Information System (RWIS).

 

Recommended Bidder:

MeteoGroup Weather Services Canada Inc.

 

Contract Award Value:

$646,356 net of all applicable taxes and charges

$730,382 including HST and all applicable charges  

$657,732 net of HST recoveries

 

Contract is expected to start on date of award and end on September 30, 2018.

 

Option Year 1: October 1, 2018 to September 30, 2019

$323,178 net of all applicable taxes and charges

$365,191 including HST and all applicable charges  

$328,866 net of HST recoveries 

 

Option Year 2: October 1, 2019 to September 30, 2020

$329,642 net of all applicable taxes and charges

$372,495 including HST and all applicable charges  

$335,444 net of HST recoveries

 

Option Year 3: October 1, 2020 to September 30, 2021

$336,235 net of all applicable taxes and charges

$379,946 including HST and all applicable charges  

$342,153 net of HST recoveries

 

The total potential cost to the City including all option years for contract award is $1,664,195 net of HST recoveries. The total potential contract award including all option years is $1,635,411 net of all applicable taxes and charges, $1,848,014 including HST and all applicable charges.

 

The above cost calculations for the Option Years reflect a 0 percent increase in Option Year 1, 2% increase in Option Year 2 and a 2 percent increase in Option Year 3 as per the bids submitted.

Summary

Call Issued:  August 12, 2016

Call Closed:  September 2, 2016

Number of Addenda Issued: None (0)

Number of Bids:  Two (2)

 

Summary of Bids Received for RFQ No. 6032-16-3114 including bid price

Firm Name

Bid Price (including H.S.T.)

MeteoGroup Weather Services Canada Inc.

$730,384

AMEC Foster Wheeler

$768,395

 

Financial Impact

The total contract award identified in this report is $1,774,377 including all applicable taxes and charges. The total potential cost to the City including all option years is $1,664,195 net of HST recoveries.

 

Funding in the amount of $657,734 net of HST recoveries is included in the 2016 Approved Capital account and 2017-2025 Capital Plan for Transportation Services.

 

Should the City choose to exercise its option to renew for an additional three (3) separate one (1) year periods, then the appropriate additional funding, if needed, will be requested in the 2019-2021 annual Capital Budget Submissions for Transportation Services under various WBS Elements, and will be considered as part of the annual budget review process.

 

The cash flow funding requirement for this project are summarized in the following table (net of HST recoveries):

 

Financial Impact Summary of Recommended Contract 

Account

Initial Term

Initial Term (continued)

Option Year 1

Option Year 2

Option Year 3

 

TOTAL POTENTIAL COST

(2017-2021)

(Date of award to Sept. 30, 2017)

Oct.1, 2018 to Sept. 30, 2019

Oct.1, 2019 to Sept. 30, 2020

Oct.1, 2020 to Sept. 30, 2021

CTP816-13-01

$328,866

$328,866

$328,866

$335,444

$342,153

$1,664,195

Background Information
